description: Static machine-readable invariant rules for Nexus Wave 2 local tooling. Read by check-core-invariants.mjs.

canonicalOrderingImmutable.description: The execution_order values in wave2-canonical-state.json must never be reordered or renumbered across turns. Each task keeps its assigned execution_order for the lifetime of Wave 2.

canonicalStateSingleSourceOfTruth.description: wave2-canonical-state.json is the sole authoritative source for task state, ordering, and blocking conditions. All other documents derive from it.

validTaskStates.description: A task's state field must be exactly one of the four permitted values. Any other value is an invariant violation.

markdownMirrorConsistency.description: Markdown tracking documents must reflect the state recorded in canonical JSON. Color indicators in markdown must match the canonical state.

colorMapping.description: Each canonical state maps to a specific color indicator used in markdown mirrors.

activeTaskRule.description: The active task is the task with the lowest execution_order whose state is not trueGreen. Tasks with state 'blocked' or 'bridge-deferred' are still counted as not trueGreen unless an explicit override is present. The currentScanPoint in the state pack represents this value.
activeTaskRule.note: If blocked/bridge-deferred tasks appear before the first actionable in-progress task, the implementation must use the lowest non-trueGreen entry and make that explicit.

executionOrderTaskNameAlignment.description: The execution_order and taskName for each entry must remain stable across turns. A task's execution_order may never be changed without explicit canonical state update, and a task's taskName must not silently diverge from the canonical entry.

highRiskCoreFiles.description: These files are considered high-risk. Changes to them require heavy impact classification and trigger full-repo rescan requirements.

coreRuntimeOrchestrationFiles.description: These runtime infrastructure files are also considered high-risk and trigger heavy impact classification.

fullRepoScanEscalationTriggers.description: These conditions require a full repository rescan. The impact analyzer will set requiresFullRepoRescan=true.
triggers: Any high-risk core file was modified

revalidationTriggers.description: These conditions require the previous task to be revalidated before proceeding.
triggers: Any core file hash changed between state pack generations
Doc sync report shows mismatches in task state

postflightRequiredChecks.description: After any task run, these checks must be performed by postflight-verify.mjs.
checks: Verify no forbidden files were touched
Verify canonical state is still readable and valid JSON
Verify doc sync still passes (no new mismatches introduced)
Verify allowed files list matches actual touched files
